meta.title: Stoa Hero Ambient Loop
meta.notes: Veo exports 16:9 — use as-is for hero background with object-cover

scene.description: Frosted glass intelligence orb in warm ivory void. Four thin glass shapes orbit in true 3D: chart arc, megaphone silhouette, target rings, document stack.

render_prompt: 10 second seamless cinematic loop, 16:9, 24fps, 1080p. True 3D motion: camera slowly orbits a frosted glass orb in ivory space. Glass marketing icons orbit independently with parallax depth. Indigo rim light, coral core pulse. NOT a zoom on a still photo. Premium product film like CURA Climate hero. Loopable with matching first/last frame.
